---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new component package or repository improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What gap are you trying to close?

## Proposed Change

Describe the desired behavior.

## Why It Belongs In This Repository

Explain why this belongs in the component package monorepo instead of the
public contract repository or a separate implementation repository.

## Acceptance Notes

- What package manifest or entry manifest should change?
- What docs should change?
- What validation or package builder smoke should prove the change?
